title: oenothera biennis var. nutans
intro: Oenothera biennis var. nutans, commonly known as the Indian or evening primrose, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. The plant is rich in medicinal properties due to its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera biennis var. nutans include relief from symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as relief from conditions like eczema and arthritis. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in capsule, oil, and tea form, and are often used to promote heart health, reduce inflammation, and support immune function.
